synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19593 Oracle Linux 9 ksh bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19593
description:
[1.0.6-7.0.1]
- Disable _AST_no_spawnveg for taskset workaround [Orabug: 26754277]

[3:1.0.6-7.2]
- Fix 'stty -echo' in scripts
- Resolves: RHEL-112564
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19593

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19593.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
ksh-1.0.6-7.0.1.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
ksh-1.0.6-7.0.1.el9_6.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/ksh-1.0.6-7.0.1.el9_6.2.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.0.6-7.0.1]
- Disable _AST_no_spawnveg for taskset workaround [Orabug: 26754277]

[3:1.0.6-7.2]
- Fix 'stty -echo' in scripts
- Resolves: RHEL-112564
